title: Bulk Stonecutting
description: Adds a checkbox in the stonecutter UI that will let you bulk craft many stacks.
body:
This is a simple minecraft mod build to help improve your time stonecutting. It can get really irritating when you want to craft many stacks of some sort of stone and you have to do 3 clicks every time you want to craft another stack. This mod simple allows you, with the press of a checkbox above the UI, to shift+click like normal, and it will automatically put another stack of the same type in (if you have it), so you can shift+click again. If your inventory is full, it will allow you to shift+click as well and it will instead throw the item stack on the ground.



Image + other small things will be added eventually to make it easier to find this mod.
